title: DaphsServer
description: This is a modpack created to be played by a community, We do now own any rights over any of the mods, we just put them together to play in a server :D
body:
# Welcome to Daph's Server Modpack

In this page you will be able to download the modpack, you can use whatever launcher you prefer, but the easy way to install this modpack is by using modrinth app.

The modpack is Low Tech based, with focus on Create to do all the automations/productions, together with Botany pots to make crops and farms easyer, and farmers delight to have lots of foods for the server. We also include a couple mods to make the player stronger like artifacts, that can be found exploring, jewelry that give the player buffs, mythic metals to trim and expand your power beyond netherite. For the explores we have End Remastered, philips ruins and dungeons and taverns. And for the builders, Rechiseled, Beautify and handcrafted to create nice constructions.


#### This modpack was build with a couple things in mind, the first one is to be a vanilla+ experience, the second thing is to allow the server to have nice and beaultiful constructions. 


![House image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/lSTVkVJB/images/d61d8c71d6e8abf3386ba047fc1f78ec4eeebe30.png)
